parameters-en.Wave: Choose from 8 different sweeping resonant filter effects, all of which respond to picking dynamics.
parameters-en.Filter: Controls the frequency of the resonant filter.
parameters-en.Decay: Controls the decay of the Filter's envelope.
parameters-en.Mix: Blends more of the effect in. Note that even at 0%, some of the synth will be heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
